stories.headline: Several people reported killed in fresh Israeli attacks on Lebanon
stories.description: Lebanon bears the brunt and US-Iran truce at risk as Israel claims killing of a close aide to Hezbollah’s leader.

stories.headline: Ukraine’s veterans’ theatre turns war wounds into catharsis
stories.description: Wounded soldiers, wives and widows workshop ideas and stage plays in Kyiv, bringing the audience to tears.

stories.headline: Record animal sacrifice attempts at Al-Aqsa spark status quo fears
stories.description: Record attempts by Israeli settlers to smuggle sacrifices into Al-Aqsa Mosque mark unprecedented escalation since 1967.

stories.headline: Trump says US forces to stay near Iran, ready for ‘next conquest’
stories.description: US threats against Iran and ongoing Israeli attacks in Lebanon cast doubt on fragile ceasefire efforts.

stories.headline: Trump slams NATO over Iran after meeting Rutte, renews Greenland threat
stories.description: US president meets NATO chief, expresses disappointment over member states failing to back war on Iran.
